scenarios.description: Empty list throws IndexOutOfBoundsException at get(0)
Single point returns list with the same single point (no loop iterations)
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is a list of size 1 containing the same Point

scenarios.description: Two points returns both points sorted (loop skipped)
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is list with both Points in natural order
pseudocode: Point p1 = new Point(1, 1); Point p2 = new Point(0, 0);

scenarios.description: Three collinear points returns only the two endpoints (upper and lower loop single iteration branch det==0)
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is list of two extreme Points sorted
pseudocode: List<Point> points = List.of(new Point(0,0), new Point(1,0), new Point(2,0));

scenarios.description: Three non-collinear points returns triangle vertices (upper loop det>0 branch)
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is sorted list of all three Points
pseudocode: List<Point> points = List.of(new Point(0,0), new Point(1,1), new Point(2,0));
assert result.equals(List.of(new Point(0,0), new Point(1,1), new Point(2,0)));

scenarios.description: Four points with one interior yields only convex quadrilateral corners (multiple iterations, interior point filtered)
scenarios.precondition: points include one interior point, size==4
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is sorted list of convex hull corner Points
pseudocode: List<Point> points = List.of(new Point(0,0), new Point(2,0), new Point(2,2), new Point(1,1));
assert result.equals(List.of(new Point(0,0), new Point(2,0), new Point(2,2), new Point(0,0)));

scenarios.description: Multiple upper and lower hull recursion paths executed (deep candidate points branching)
scenarios.precondition: complex set generating recursion in constructHull
scenarios.expectedResult: return value equals intended convex hull of given points
pseudocode: List<Point> points = List.of(new Point(0,0), new Point(5,0), new Point(5,5), new Point(0,5), new Point(2,2));
assert result.equals(List.of(new Point(0,0), new Point(5,0), new Point(5,5), new Point(0,5)));
